ai_disclosure: Content developed with AI assistance and reviewed/approved by the human author. AI-assisted/synthetic text is marked. Disclosure per EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689) Article 50, effective 2026-08-02.
audience: Adult users (18+) in academic or professional contexts
name: AUGMANITAI Atlas (Curated Excerpt)
description: Curated AUGMANITAI terms with full bilingual definitions presented as a searchable card-grid atlas. Curated public excerpt from the larger Augmanitai compendium. Single-file HTML artifact with hand-written vanilla JS, no external dependencies.

referencePublication.name: Augmanitai Research Programme: terminology and phenomenology of human-AI interaction
